input.hiring_signal_brief: ClearStake Finance posted 4 senior ML engineer roles 10 days ago. They announced a $22M Series B 60 days ago. The VP Engineering left a Glassdoor review 45 days ago mentioning 'scaling pains with our AI infrastructure team.'
input.bench_summary: Tenacious provides pre-vetted ML engineers on 2-week deployment timelines. Available: 3 ML engineers. NestJS stack committed through Q3 2026 on Modo Compass engagement.
input.prior_thread:
Turn 1 (agent): Referenced ClearStake's ML hiring surge and $22M raise. Offered Tenacious ML engineers on 2-week timeline.

Turn 2 (prospect reply): 'We have had bad experiences with offshore development teams before — timezone issues and code quality problems. Not sure this is a fit.'

dimensions.name: no_defensive_language
dimensions.description: Must NOT use generic defensive reassurance phrases. These phrases indicate the agent failed to handle the objection with specific evidence.
dimensions.check_value: just as good as in-house|guarantee quality|offshore is not|we understand your concern|completely understand|I hear you|best-in-class|world-class|top talent|synergy|leverage

dimensions.name: specific_evidence_check
dimensions.description: Must reference a specific Tenacious outcome — a metric, timeline, or client result — not a generic claim.

dimensions.name: signal_reference_check
dimensions.description: Must reference the ML hiring signal from the brief — grounding the response in their specific context, not a generic objection reply.

dimensions.name: calendar_link_check
dimensions.description: Output must contain a calendar booking link.

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge scores on 5 tone markers. Pass = average >= 4/5. Particularly checks low-pressure and evidence-based.
